name: Spinach Salad with Pears and Cranberries
recipeIngredient: 1 lb baby spinach leaves, rinsed, crisped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the orange peel, orange juice, seasoned rice vinegar, and dried cranberries in a bowl.
2. Core and thinly slice the pears; add them to the dressing along with the sliced red onion.
3. Just before serving, pour the mixture over the spinach and gently mix.
